tool_args.label: Joint Metro-North and LIRR Committee Key Performance Metrics - May 2026

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: This performance metrics document was prepared for the May 2026 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.
Comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Rob Free, President, Long Island Rail Road

payload.description: MTA agency responsible for major capital construction projects

tool_args.label: Port Authority of New York and New Jersey

payload.entity_name: Port Authority of New York and New Jersey

payload.description: LIRR is replacing its aging Jamaica traction-power substation, built in 1971. A new two-story prefabricated modular substation building with AC and DC switchgear, rectifiers, and a motor generator. 12 modules total - first 6 installed May 9, one more May 16, remaining 5 to follow. Existing substation stays operational until new one is tested and accepted. Old facility will be decommissioned and removed.

Upgrades to four Waterbury Branch stations at Derby-Shelton, Ansonia, Beacon Falls, and Seymour. New 350-foot platforms, covered canopies, enclosed windshields, real-time arrival info, ticket vending, improved lighting, wayfinding, ADA accessibility, better pedestrian access.

warnings: project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.

tool_args.label: New Haven Line Power Upgrades - Substation 128 and 178 Replacement

payload.project_name: New Haven Line Power Upgrades - Substation 128 and 178 Replacement
payload.description: Replacing two aging AC power substations on the New Haven Line - Substation 128 in Mamaroneck and Substation 178 in Harrison. New prefabricated walk-in metal-clad switchgear enclosures. Substantial completion expected in December 2026. Will improve power capacity, resiliency, and reliability.
Upcoming station redesign at Jamaica LIRR Station. MTA together with Port Authority of New York and New Jersey held an in-person outreach effort to connect with customers about the redesign.

In-house team renovated the entire waiting room at Kew Gardens station, including restoration of original ticket windows, modernized ADA-compliant restrooms, and extensive exterior work. The latest success of the Station Spruce Up program.

warnings: project.program is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Program names caused identity overmerge; they are relation context, not strong project identity. Suggested relation: part_of_program.

payload.description: Weekend ferry service between Haverstraw and Ossining operating Saturdays and Sundays, hourly 11:23 am to 9:10 pm, scheduled to meet Hudson Line trains at Ossining. Runs Memorial Day Saturday May 23 through October 31, two weeks longer than previous years. Transport of Rockland buses provide complimentary rides into Haverstraw Village and other destinations.

tool_args.label: LIRR Tentative Deal Reached with Five Labor Unions

payload.description: A tentative deal reached with the five labor unions on Monday evening, May 18, ending a strike. LIRR returned to service.

Metro-North unveiled its ninth Heritage locomotive (Locomotive #250) celebrating the nation's 250th anniversary. Design features American flag formed from Declaration of Independence text, historic symbols from early U.S. coinage.

tool_args.label: Waterbury Branch Station Construction Start Announcement

payload.description: Announcement of start of construction on four Waterbury Branch stations at Derby-Shelton, Ansonia, Beacon Falls, and Seymour.
14th annual blood drive in partnership with New York Blood Center in Grand Central's Vanderbilt Hall. Employee drives also at North White Plains (May 21) and Croton-Harmon (May 28).
US Open at Shinnecock Hills in Southampton. Extra LIRR train service to and from a temporary station being built just south of Shinnecock Hills Country Club.
Staycation Showcase event in Grand Central's Vanderbilt Hall, introducing local-area day-trip and vacation ideas to more than 500 visitors with over 25 tourism partners.
Long Island Rail Road will recognize winners of last year's School Safety Backpack Contest at Oregon Middle School in Medford, NY.
Metro-North leadership visited Stamford for a Connect With Us event to meet and listen to riders.

tool_args.label: Lakeview Spring Cleanup at Lakeview Station

payload.description: LIRR joined Lakeview Civic Association for Spring Clean-Up at Lakeview Station. Stations Department supplied materials, MTA Police Department assisted.

2nd Annual Rivertowns Summit hosted by Historic Hudson River Towns. Metro-North Director of Government and Community Relations Andy Buder attended and spoke. Featured presentations on wayfinding, signage, tourism, microtransit.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.
event.participants is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Participant lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: has_participant.

tool_args.label: Waterbury Branch Only Metro-North Line Exceeding Pre-COVID Ridership

payload.claim_text: The Waterbury Branch is the only line on which ridership exceeds pre-COVID levels, the result of the increased frequencies and greater convenience to customers.
payload.subject: Waterbury Branch
